name: @featbit/claude-skills
description: Official agent skills collection for FeatBit with 17 specialized skills for SDK integration, deployment, APIs, and platform workflows

skills.name: featbit-getting-started
skills.description: Step-by-step guide for first-run FeatBit setup, first feature flags, and onboarding workflows

skills.name: featbit-documentation
skills.description: Expert knowledge of FeatBit's complete documentation

skills.name: featbit-rest-api
skills.description: Expert guidance for FeatBit REST API authentication and management operations

skills.name: featbit-opentelemetry
skills.description: Expert guidance for FeatBit OpenTelemetry observability integration

skills.name: featbit-deployment-docker
skills.description: Expert Docker Compose deployment guidance for FeatBit

skills.name: featbit-deployment-kubernetes
skills.description: Expert Kubernetes and Helm deployment guidance for FeatBit

skills.name: featbit-deployment-aws
skills.description: Guidance for deploying FeatBit on AWS with ECS Fargate, EKS, and Terraform

skills.name: featbit-sdks-dotnet
skills.description: Expert guidance for FeatBit .NET Server SDK integration

skills.name: featbit-sdks-node
skills.description: Expert guidance for FeatBit Node.js Server SDK integration

skills.name: featbit-sdks-python
skills.description: Expert guidance for FeatBit Python Server SDK integration

skills.name: featbit-sdks-java
skills.description: Expert guidance for FeatBit Java Server SDK integration

skills.name: featbit-sdks-go
skills.description: Expert guidance for FeatBit Go Server SDK integration

skills.name: featbit-sdks-javascript
skills.description: Expert guidance for FeatBit JavaScript Client SDK

skills.name: featbit-sdks-react
skills.description: Expert guidance for FeatBit React Client SDK

skills.name: featbit-sdks-react-native
skills.description: Expert guidance for FeatBit React Native SDK

skills.name: featbit-sdks
skills.description: SDK language router — routes questions to the correct language-specific SDK skill

skills.name: featbit-evaluation-insights-api
skills.description: Flag Evaluation API and Track Insights API for building custom SDKs on mobile platforms (Kotlin, Swift, Android, iOS, etc.)
